summary: Navigation menu functionality testing including access to Platform, Pricing, Company pages, call-to-action buttons, and GitLab Duo feature link from the homepage

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Platform navigation link successfully navigates to the platform page, demonstrating a positive test scenario for primary navigation functionality.
actions: Click the "Platform" link in the navigation menu
validations: The page displays the platform page content
The heading "The most comprehensive AI-powered DevSecOps Platform" is visible on the page

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Pricing navigation link successfully navigates to the pricing page, demonstrating a positive test scenario for primary navigation functionality.
actions: Click the "Pricing" link in the navigation menu
validations: The page displays the pricing page content
The heading "Get started with GitLab" is visible on the page

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Company navigation link successfully navigates to the company page, demonstrating a positive test scenario for primary navigation functionality.
actions: Click the "Company" link in the navigation menu
validations: The page displays the company page content
The heading "About GitLab" is visible on the page

content.objective: Verify that clicking the GitLab Duo related button or link in the page content successfully navigates to the GitLab Duo page, demonstrating a positive test scenario for feature-specific navigation.
actions: Click the button or link related to GitLab Duo in the page content
validations: The page displays the GitLab Duo page content
GitLab Duo branding or logo is visible on the page
